features: DUAL-ENDED DESIGN: This 2-in-1 eye makeup pen features an eyebrow pencil on one end and an eyeliner pen on the other for convenient and efficient application
LONG-LASTING WATERPROOF FORMULA: The eyebrow pen and black eyeliner are waterproof and long-lasting, ensuring your brows and eye makeup stay in place all day
PRECISE FORK TIP: The fork tip microblading eyebrow pencil allows for precise and natural-looking eyebrow filling and shaping for defined, sculpted brows
SMUDGEPROOF EYELINER FINISH: The black liquid eyeliner pen delivers a smooth, smudgeproof finish for long-lasting eye definition
CONVENIENT AND PORTABLE: This dual-ended pen with magic eyebrow pencil and eyeliner pen is compact and portable, making it convenient for on-the-go touch-ups or a complete makeup routine
description: Product Description Achieve naturally defined eyebrows with this versatile 2-in-1 dual-ended makeup pencil. BROW PENCIL AND EYE LINER PEN FEATUTURES: 1. Angled fork tip eyebrow pen can create a natural hair-like strokes eyebrow shape. 2. Liquid black eyeliner with smooth glides and fine tips allow you control easily 3. Both eyeliner and magic eyebrow pencil are waterproof smudge-proof and long-wearing formula 4. 2 in 1 eye makeup pen is convenient for touch-ups and on-the-go PACKAGE INCLUDE: 1 X Dual-End Eye Makeup Pen (Eyebrow Pencil And Black Eyeliner)
